name: Obsidian
northStar: Crystalline Knowledge Vault. A sharp, faceted digital space built for clarity and focus, with glowing violet veins of interaction.

dos: Use the system UI font for all text to maintain the native-app feel.
Reserve Amethyst (#7c3aed) and Lavender (#a78bfa) exclusively for interactive elements like buttons and links.
Employ subtle 1px inset white glows for definition on dark cards and buttons.
Maintain high contrast with light gray text (#eeeeee) on near-black backgrounds (#171717).
Use pill-shaped radii (9999px) for tags and badges only; keep other elements sharp.
Keep layouts centered and spacious, with generous vertical rhythm between sections.
donts: Do not use traditional drop shadows for elevation; prefer the inset glow effect.
Do not introduce other saturated colors into the primary UI; stick to the violet-on-dark palette.
Do not use decorative or serif fonts; the brand identity is utilitarian.
Do not use bright or light-themed backgrounds for primary content sections.
Do not use large border radii on cards or buttons; stick to the 8-12px range.
Do not use lifestyle photography; focus on the product UI as the primary visual.

colors.name: White
colors.role: Bright text on dark CTAs, inset glows for definition

colors.name: Amethyst
colors.role: Primary CTA buttons—a sharp, functional accent against the dark theme

colors.name: Lavender
colors.role: Links, badge text, and active states—the secondary, brighter interaction color

colors.name: Tag Background
colors.role: Background for tag/badge elements, used at 15% opacity

colors.name: Success Green
colors.role: Success states or syntax highlighting within the app UI

colors.name: Warning Yellow
colors.role: Warning states or syntax highlighting within the app UI

colors.name: Error Red
colors.role: Error states or syntax highlighting within the app UI

similar.why: Shares the dark UI, native-app feel from using system fonts, and a focus on utility and speed.
Similar dark, high-contrast aesthetic with a single sharp violet/purple accent and subtle internal glow effects.
Directly echoes the visual language of a code editor, appealing to a developer-adjacent audience with its dark theme and focus on plaintext.
Another productivity tool with a premium, dark-mode-first interface that emphasizes speed and function over adornment.

imagery.role: Purely explanatory and demonstrative. Imagery serves to show exactly what the product is and how it works, reinforcing the brand's focus on utility and transparency.
imagery.style: Visuals are clean, direct, and functional. There is no lifestyle photography. The only non-UI graphics are the faceted app icon and the abstract, node-based graph view visualization.
imagery.density: The page alternates between text-heavy blocks and large, dominant product visuals.
imagery.treatment: The product UI is the hero image. Visuals are typically full-bleed or large, contained screenshots of the application in its dark theme. Edges are sharp and unadorned.

designSystem.northStar: Crystalline Knowledge Vault. A sharp, faceted digital space built for clarity and focus, with glowing violet veins of interaction.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Solid Amethyst (#7c3aed) background with White (#ffffff) text. Padding is 16px 24px. Corner radius is 8px.

components.name: Secondary Ghost Button
components.role: A less prominent action, often for secondary choices like 'More platforms'.
components.description: Transparent background with Medium Gray (#bcbcbc) text. Padding is 8px. Corner radius is 8px. No border.

components.name: Community Link Card
components.role: Large, clickable cards used to link to community resources.
components.description: Surface (#1e1e1e) background with Bright Gray (#eeeeee) text. Padding is 24px. Corner radius is 12px. Features a 1px white inset glow `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`.

components.name: Tag Badge
components.role: Used inside the app UI to display tags on notes.
components.description: Pill-shaped (9999px radius). Background is Tag Background (#8a5cf5) at 15% opacity. Text is Lavender (#a78bfa). Padding is 2px 8px.

components.name: App Showcase
components.role: Displays the product UI directly on the page.
components.description: A detailed screenshot or rendered view of the Obsidian application, showing elements like the note editor, sidebar file browser, and distinctive graph view. Follows the site's dark theme.

components.name: App Icon
components.role: The primary brand mark and application icon.
components.description: A squircle-shaped icon (approx 20% border-radius) depicting a faceted purple and black gem. Has a subtle internal gloss and shadow to give it dimension.

components.name: Navigation Link
components.role: Text links in the main header navigation.
components.description: Medium Gray (#bcbcbc) text using the system UI font at 16px. No background or borders. Hover state is likely a color change to Bright Gray (#eeeeee).

typography.role: Used for all text. The choice of a system font is deliberate, making the website feel like a native application—a functional tool for thought.
typography.letterSpacing: Negative tracking (-0.02em) on larger sizes tightens headlines for a more compact, solid appearance.

designSystem.description: The design feels like being inside a piece of precision software—a dark, focused digital workspace where thoughts crystallize. The foundation is a near-black, void-like background (#171717), creating a high-contrast canvas. A single, electric violet accent (#7c3aed, #a78bfa) is used strictly for interactive elements like CTAs and links, acting as functional beacons in the dark. Typography is exclusively the system's native UI font, reinforcing its identity as a functional tool rather than a stylized marketing site. Instead of drop shadows, surfaces use a subtle, 1px white inset highlight, giving them an internal luminescence as if lit from within.
designSystem.elevationPhilosophy: Elevation is achieved through internal luminescence, not external shadows. Most interactive surfaces like cards and buttons feature a 1px inset white 'glow' (e.g., `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`). This creates definition and a subtle sense of depth without making elements feel like they are floating above the surface, reinforcing the in-app, digital tool aesthetic.

1b:Tc49,

Your thoughts are yours.

Obsidian stores notes privately on your device, so you can access them quickly, even offline. No one else can read them, not even us.

Your mind is unique.

With thousands of plugins and themes, you can shape Obsidian to fit your way of thinking.

Your knowledge should last.

Obsidian uses open file formats, so you're never locked in. You own your data for the long term.

Free without limits.

Download now →
1c:T4ee,### Quick Color Reference - **Page Background**: `Abyss (#171717)` - **Card Background**: `Surface (#1e1e1e)` - **Default Text**: `Bright Gray (#eeeeee)` - **Primary CTA**: `Amethyst (#7c3aed)` - **Accent / Link**: `Lavender (#a78bfa)` - **Border Glow**: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)` ### Example Component Prompts 1. **Hero Section:** Create a hero section with a full-bleed Abyss (#171717) background. Add a centered headline 'Knowledge, connected.' in 60px system UI font, weight 600, color Bright Gray (#eeeeee), with -1.2px letter-spacing. Below it, add a sub-headline 'Your second brain, for life.' in 24px system font, weight 400, color Medium Gray (#bcbcbc), with -0.48px letter-spacing. Add a primary CTA button below that. 2. **Primary CTA Button:** Create a button with text 'Get Started'. The background is Amethyst (#7c3aed) with White (#ffffff) text. Use a 16px system UI font, weight 500. Padding is 16px vertical and 24px horizontal. Corner radius is 8px. 3. **Feature Card:** Create a feature card with a Surface (#1e1e1e) background. Padding is 24px. The corner radius is 12px. Add an inset box-shadow of `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`. Inside, add a heading in Bright Gray (#eeeeee) and body text in Medium Gray (#bcbcbc).
